top_signals.title: BNP Paribas Stock Traders Ride Wall Street Rally With 43% Gain
top_signals.summary: BNP Paribas SA reported better-than-expected revenue and profit for the second quarter as its stock traders blew past analysts’ estimates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Hackers steal $31.6M with 2 crypto bridge attacks within 7 hours
top_signals.summary: AFX, a decentralized perpetual exchange operating on Arbitrum, reportedly lost $24.15 million on Wednesday, while the Verus Ethereum bridge was attacked hours later.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Piero Cipollone: The cooperative spirit at the heart of the digital euro
Burnham means business: PM slashes business rates bills for pubs, clubs and live music venues
top_signals.summary: Continuing his drive to build an economy that works for every postcode, the Prime Minister has taken action to cut business rates bills for pubs, social clubs and live music venues across England from April next year.

top_signals.title: Zimbabwe’s State Firm Secures $300 Million to Develop Lithium Mine
top_signals.summary: Mutapa Energy Resources, Zimbabwe’s state-owned lithium miner, has secured $300 million from a group of companies, which includes Chinese entities, to develop its facilities in the southern African nation.
